hubs.name: HUB_ACTOR
hubs.description: Hub table for actors (DVD rental performers). Business key: actor_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.actor.

hubs.name: HUB_ADDRESS
hubs.description: Hub table for physical addresses (stores, customers, staff). Business key: address_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.address.

hubs.name: HUB_CATEGORY
hubs.description: Hub table for film categories / genres. Business key: category_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.category.

hubs.name: HUB_CITY
hubs.description: Hub table for cities referenced by addresses. Business key: city_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.city.

hubs.name: HUB_COUNTRY
hubs.description: Hub table for countries referenced by cities. Business key: country_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.country.

hubs.name: HUB_CUSTOMER
hubs.description: Hub table for rental customers. Business key: customer_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.customer.

hubs.name: HUB_FILM
hubs.description: Hub table for films in the rental catalogue. Business key: film_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.film.

hubs.name: HUB_INVENTORY
hubs.description: Hub table for physical film copies per store. Business key: inventory_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.inventory.

hubs.name: HUB_LANGUAGE
hubs.description: Hub table for film languages. Business key: language_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.language.

hubs.name: HUB_PAYMENT
hubs.description: Hub table for payments made by customers. Business key: payment_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.payment.

hubs.name: HUB_RENTAL
hubs.description: Hub table for rental transactions. Business key: rental_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.rental.

hubs.name: HUB_STAFF
hubs.description: Hub table for store staff members. Business key: staff_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.staff.

hubs.name: HUB_STORE
hubs.description: Hub table for rental store locations. Business key: store_id. Source: cdc.dvdrental.store.

links.name: LNK_ADDRESS_CITY
links.description: Link table connecting HUB_ADDRESS ↔ HUB_CITY. Relationship keys: address_id, city_id. Source: silver.silver_address. Classification confidence: HIGH.

hub_ref_descriptions.HUB_ADDRESS: Foreign hash key reference to HUB_ADDRESS (derived from address_id)
hub_ref_descriptions.HUB_CITY: Foreign hash key reference to HUB_CITY (derived from city_id)

links.name: LNK_CITY_COUNTRY
links.description: Link table connecting HUB_CITY ↔ HUB_COUNTRY. Relationship keys: city_id, country_id. Source: silver.silver_city. Classification confidence: HIGH.

hub_ref_descriptions.HUB_CITY: Foreign hash key reference to HUB_CITY (derived from city_id)
hub_ref_descriptions.HUB_COUNTRY: Foreign hash key reference to HUB_COUNTRY (derived from country_id)

links.name: LNK_CUSTOMER_STORE
links.description: Link table connecting HUB_CUSTOMER ↔ HUB_STORE. Relationship keys: customer_id, store_id. Source: silver.silver_customer. Classification confidence: HIGH.

hub_ref_descriptions.HUB_CUSTOMER: Foreign hash key reference to HUB_CUSTOMER (derived from customer_id)
hub_ref_descriptions.HUB_STORE: Foreign hash key reference to HUB_STORE (derived from store_id)

links.description: Link table connecting HUB_CUSTOMER ↔ HUB_ADDRESS. Relationship keys: customer_id, address_id. Source: silver.silver_customer. Classification confidence: HIGH.

hub_ref_descriptions.HUB_ADDRESS: Foreign hash key reference to HUB_ADDRESS (derived from address_id)

links.name: LNK_FILM_LANGUAGE
links.description: Link table connecting HUB_FILM ↔ HUB_LANGUAGE. Relationship keys: film_id, language_id. Source: silver.silver_film. Classification confidence: HIGH.

satellites.name: SAT_ACTOR_CORE
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_ACTOR tracking all descriptive payload columns. Tracked columns: first_name, last_name. Source: silver.silver_actor.

satellites.name: SAT_ADDRESS_CORE
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_ADDRESS tracking all descriptive payload columns. Tracked columns: address, address2, district, postal_code, phone. Source: silver.silver_address.

satellites.name: SAT_CATEGORY_CORE
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_CATEGORY tracking all descriptive payload columns. Tracked columns: name. Source: silver.silver_category.

satellites.name: SAT_CITY_CORE
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_CITY tracking all descriptive payload columns. Tracked columns: city. Source: silver.silver_city.

satellites.name: SAT_COUNTRY_CORE
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_COUNTRY tracking all descriptive payload columns. Tracked columns: country. Source: silver.silver_country.

satellites.name: SAT_CUSTOMER_CORE
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_CUSTOMER tracking all descriptive payload columns. Tracked columns: first_name, last_name, email, activebool, active. Source: silver.silver_customer.

satellites.name: SAT_FILM_CORE
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_FILM tracking core descriptive attributes (split from pricing). Tracked columns: title, description, release_year, length, rating, special_features, fulltext. Source: silver.silver_film.

satellites.name: SAT_FILM_PRICING
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_FILM tracking pricing / financial attributes (split from core). Tracked columns: rental_duration, rental_rate, replacement_cost. Source: silver.silver_film.

satellites.name: SAT_INVENTORY
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_INVENTORY tracking audit marker (tracks existence and timestamps). Tracked columns: last_update. Source: silver.silver_inventory.

satellites.name: SAT_LANGUAGE_CORE
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_LANGUAGE tracking all descriptive payload columns. Tracked columns: name. Source: silver.silver_language.

satellites.name: SAT_PAYMENT_CORE
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_PAYMENT tracking core descriptive attributes (split from pricing). Tracked columns: payment_date. Source: silver.silver_payment.

satellites.name: SAT_PAYMENT_PRICING
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_PAYMENT tracking pricing / financial attributes (split from core). Tracked columns: amount. Source: silver.silver_payment.

satellites.name: SAT_RENTAL_CORE
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_RENTAL tracking all descriptive payload columns. Tracked columns: rental_date, return_date. Source: silver.silver_rental.

satellites.name: SAT_STAFF_CORE
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_STAFF tracking all descriptive payload columns. Tracked columns: first_name, last_name, email, username, active. Source: silver.silver_staff.

satellites.name: SAT_STORE
satellites.description: Satellite for HUB_STORE tracking audit marker (tracks existence and timestamps). Tracked columns: last_update. Source: silver.silver_store.

pit_tables.name: PIT_FILM
pit_tables.description: Point-in-Time table for HUB_FILM. Provides aligned daily snapshots joining satellites: SAT_FILM_CORE, SAT_FILM_PRICING. Grain: daily per hub key.

pit_tables.name: PIT_RENTAL
pit_tables.description: Point-in-Time table for HUB_RENTAL. Provides aligned daily snapshots joining satellites: SAT_RENTAL_CORE. Grain: daily per hub key.

pit_tables.name: PIT_CUSTOMER
pit_tables.description: Point-in-Time table for HUB_CUSTOMER. Provides aligned daily snapshots joining satellites: SAT_CUSTOMER_CORE. Grain: daily per hub key.

pit_tables.name: PIT_PAYMENT
pit_tables.description: Point-in-Time table for HUB_PAYMENT. Provides aligned daily snapshots joining satellites: SAT_PAYMENT_CORE, SAT_PAYMENT_PRICING. Grain: daily per hub key.

bridge_tables.name: BRG_RENTAL_FILM
bridge_tables.description: Bridge table traversing multi-hop relationships: HUB_RENTAL → LNK_RENTAL_INVENTORY → HUB_INVENTORY → LNK_INVENTORY_FILM → HUB_FILM. Enables direct joins across the path without intermediate lookups.

bridge_tables.name: BRG_FILM_CAST
bridge_tables.description: Bridge table traversing multi-hop relationships: HUB_FILM → LNK_FILM_ACTOR → HUB_ACTOR. Enables direct joins across the path without intermediate lookups.
